name: User Story
description: Template for creating user stories
title: ''
labels: new
assignees: ''
body:
  - type: markdown
    attributes:
      value: |
        **As a** [role]
        **I need** [function]
        **So that** [benefit]

        ### Details and Assumptions
            * [document what you know]

        ### Acceptance Criteria
            Given [some context]
            When [certain action is taken]
            Then [the outcome of action is observed]
